actions.rationale: The red 'Attack!' button is the primary call-to-action in the lower-left corner of the home village screen; tapping it begins matchmaking for a new raid.

notes: MOVE.dx/dy are absolute screen pixel coordinates against the 2001x923 source image. A tolerant grader should accept any (dx, dy) inside the Attack button's hitbox (roughly x in [25, 165], y in [770, 880]).
